meta.title: We Offsite — Corporate Retreats for Remote Teams
meta.description: B2B corporate retreat planning for remote teams. Strategy, logistics, and unforgettable offsite experiences.

hero.title: Where great teams go to become greater.
hero.subtitle: We Offsite helps distributed companies plan extraordinary team retreats, handling every detail so your team just shows up and connects.

howItWorks.label: THE PROCESS
howItWorks.title: From brief to boardwalk in 6 weeks.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We learn your team's goals, culture, and budget.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Venues, activities, logistics — tailored to your needs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We handle flights, hotels, and the full agenda. You just connect.

services.title: Three ways we can help you.

meetings.title: Strategic Meetings
meetings.desc: Find the ideal environment for productive work sessions and key decision-making.

retreats.title: Company Retreats
retreats.desc: Kick-offs designed to strengthen the corporate culture of remote teams.

logistics.title: Full Logistics
logistics.desc: We handle everything: from flights and hotels to technical equipment and teambuilding.

caseStudies.label: EXPEDITIONS · 2022–2025
caseStudies.title: Every offsite is a story.
caseStudies.subtitle: Companies that trust us for their corporate retreats

calendly.title: Let's plan your next expedition.
calendly.subtitle: 30-minute call. No commitment. Free proposal delivered in 48h.

cta.title: Get free proposals for your corporate event
cta.subtitle: We analyze your team's goals to present personalized proposals for accommodation, teambuilding and logistics.
